class.name: GKChallengeDefinition
class.brief_description: Describes a challenge template configured in Game Center.
class.description: Wraps [code skip-lint]GKChallengeDefinition[/code], including metadata, repeatability, and image/loading helpers.

method.name: has_active_challenges
method.description: Checks whether this definition currently has active challenges. The callback receives [code](bool has_active, Variant error)[/code].

method.name: load_challenge_definitions
method.description: Loads challenge definitions for the current player/account context.

members.member: Supported challenge durations represented as date-component dictionaries.
Group identifier for related challenge definitions.
Whether the challenge can be repeated.
Associated leaderboard, if this definition tracks score.
